AframeXR Python: 3D Visualization in Python

AframeXR Python is a declarative 3D visualization library for Python. With a syntax inspired by Vega-Altair and Vega-Lite, it enables you to easily import and display interactive 3D graphics, offering a simple and intuitive way to visualize your data in three dimensions.

Python
pip install aframexr
Getting started

Get started with AframeXR Python library with an easy example of how to create a simple chart.
Examples

Explore different usages and 3D visualizations you can create using AframeXR in notebooks.
User guide

Learn about the various possibilities and functions of the AframeXR Python library.
API

Detailed information about the methods and classes available in AframeXR.

Usages

VR Visualization

Notebooks

3D browser visualization

Chart interaction
